title: IMANA YADUKUNZE ISI ITARAREMWA
lyrics:
I. URUKUNDO RW'IMANA
1.IMANA YADUKUNZE ISI ITARAREMWA
1. Imana yadukunze isi itararemwa rwose,
Ijuru ritararemwa twarikumwe na Yesu.
Tugeze hano mu isi dusanga yuzuye ibyaha,
Ibyi isi bitugezeho biraduhetamisha.
R/Iyo Yesu ataza, jyewe nari mfuye (x2)
Ndamuhereza ishimwe kuko yankijij'ibyaha
Ndamukurira ubwatsi kuko yampaye ubugingo
Yesu akiza ubugingo Yesu akiza imibiri
Yemwe Ntore z'Imana twabikijijwe na Yesu
Iyo Yesu ataza twari kuzagana he?
Iyo adatuma Branham twari kuzagana he?
2. Murebe urwo rukundo yaje kudukiza ibyaha,
Yaje kutubohora kandi yitwaje n'ljambo;
Ati abarushye mwese n'abarembejwe n'ibyaha
Nimuze mbaruhure mwakire Umwuka n'ljambo.
3. None Iryo Jambo yaribibye mu mutima wawe,
Reka rikubohore kandi ryere imbuto nyinshi,
Ureke kurirwanya nubwo rivugwa n'abantu
Kuko uhereye kera Umwuka Akoresha abantu.
4. Uwo Mwami Yesu sinabona uko mushima
kuko yanyitangiye akanabambwa ku bwanjye
4
Amena Amaraso ye kugirango andage Ubwami
iyo Yesu ataza nari kuzaganahe
5. Yampaye ibyishimo anyereka urukundo
Mbona n'umunezero ntari nakabona mu isi
Amvura indwara zose ankuraho imitwaro
lyo Yesu ataza nari kuzaganahe
6. None mugenzi wanjye ngwino wisangire Yesu
Agukize umuriro uzatwika iy'isi yose
Uruhuke uburetwa uvurwe imvune zose
Wibonere amahirwe kandi uzashire agahinda
5

title: UMVA, WA JURU WE
lyrics:
2. UMVA, WA JURU WE
1. Umva wa juru we n'ibikurimo byose
Uburyo Yesu agira neza
Na we wa si y'abantu n'inyamaswa zose
Tumuhimbaze ni mwiza
R/ Ni Umugwaneza ni Umugwaneza (3x)
Umwami Imana yanjye
Ni Umugwaneza haleluya!
Oh nzamuhimbaza iteka.
2. Turacumura, dutakaza byose
Mu bugwaneza Bwe ariyemeza
Kuducungura ahimbazwe
3. Nk'Umwana w'Intama,
Yaje hano mu isi Amena Amaraso
Ngo Aducungure,
Kuva icyo gihe twavuga tuti:
Wa rupfu we, waraneshejwe
4. Kimwe n'ikizu, Araturinda,
Azi ibyo dukena, n'abari mu kaga
Kandi buri munsi
Arangurura ati: "Nimuhumure, turi kumwe!"
6
5. Kandi nk'uko inkoko igota imishwi yayo,
Yesu aratugota kandi Atwitaho;
Inkuba n'imiyaga byaturuka he,
Turi mu mahoro asesuye.
6. Ndahimbaza, nkaramya Umwami Yesu
Ku byo Adahwema kunkorera byose;
Sinashobora kubara imigisha,
Ndumva nshaka kumuramya.
7

title: NARI KUBA UWANDE
lyrics:
3. NARI KUBA UWANDE
1. Nari kuba uwande iyo ntagira Yesu
Mba mboshywe n'ibyaha
Ndi umunyamibabaro
Nari kuba uwande iyo ntagira Yesu
Ubuzima bwanjye bwari kuba amaganya.
R/Nari kuba uwande iyo ntagira Yesu
Nari kuba nk'ubwato nta musare
Nari kuba uwande Iyo ntagira Yesu
Ubugingo bwanjye bwari kuba mubapfuye.
2. Nari kuba uwande iyo ntagira Yesu
Nari kuba imbohe y'amadini yiyunze
Nari kuba uwande iyo ntagira Yesu
Nari bwizere intekerezo z'abantu.
3. Nari kuba uwande iyo ntagira Yesu
Mba narayobejwe niy'isi ya none
Nari kuba uwande iyo ntagira Yesu
Nari butwarwe n'ibiriho by'iy'isi.
4. Nari kuba uwande iyo ntagira Yesu
Nari kubaho nta byiringiro mfite
Nari kuba uwande iyo ntagira Yesu
Mba nararengewe, mba narashobewe.
8
5. Nari kuba uwande iyo ntagira Yesu
Narikuba uwande iyo Eliya ataza Nari kuba uwande iyo ntagira Yesu,
Nari kwakira ikimenyetso cy'inyamaswa.
9

title: MANA URI MWIZA
lyrics:
4. MANA URI MWIZA
1. Mana uri mwiza unyitaho rwose,
Untekerezaho ugakiranuka,
Ngwino uyisange uko umeze kose
Irashaka kugufasha mu makuba.
R/Imana izi ibikuremereye byose
Bikubangamiye bikubuza amahoro
Ibyifuzo byawe byose Imana irabizi
Hamwe n'Imana byose birashoboka
2. Ibaho iteka ishobora byose
Ngwino uyisenge iragusubiza,
Mu icuraburindi kwiheba n'agahinda,
Menya yuko mu ljuru utibagiranye.
3. Mana ujye umfasha yobora intambwe zanjye
Murungendo rwanjye ngandukire Imana,
Ntugire ubwoba Yesu akwitayeho
Arasohoza ibyo yasezeranije.
10

title: KU MABABA Y'INUMA
lyrics:
5.KU MABABA Y'INUMA
1. Nowa yari mu nkuge, yamaze iminsi myinshi
Yashakishije ikirwa, mu buryo bwinshi
Yahuye n'ingorane,
ntizavuye mu ijuru
Imuha ikimenyetso ku mababa y'inuma
R/Ku mababa y'inuma Yera
Imana iduha urukundo
Ikimenyetso cyo mu Ijuru
Ku mababa y'inuma.
2. Yesu mukiza wacu, yavukiye mu isi
Mu ruhongore rw'inka mu muvure w'inka
Yaranzwe hano mu isi, ntiyanzwe no mu ljuru
Imuha ikimenyetso, ku mababa y'inuma
3. Narababaye cyane, mu buryo bwinshi
Nagumye ntabaza ijoro n'umunsi
Ukwizera kwanjye, ntiyakwirengagije
Yampaye ikimenyetso, ku mababa y'inuma.
11

title: NDIRIMBA IYI NDIRIMBO
lyrics:
6. NDIRIMBA IYI NDIRIMBO
1. Nshima ndirimba ndanezerewe
Kubwo guhimbaza Umwami wanjye
We wasize ubwiza bwe mu liuru
Kubwo kunkiza uburetwa bw'icyaha
R/ Mwami wanjye Yesu ushimwe cyane
Izina ryawe rihimbazwe iteka
Nguhaye ubugingo bwanjye
Rinda genzura intambwe zanjye oh Yesu
Ndakwihaye wese
2. Urukundo rwe rusumba byose
Mu Maraso ye narabohowe
Kandi nakuwe mu mwijima pe
Ntawundi nshima ni Yesu mukundwa
3. Ndi n'umugenzi hano mu iy' isi
Nahisemo Yesu rumuri rwaniye
No kuyoborwa ngana isiyoni
Muri urwo rurembo umurwa w'iteka.
12

title: YABAMBWE K'UMUSARABA
lyrics:
7. YABAMBWE K'UMUSARABA
1. Mfite Umukiza mwiza cyane
Yambereye Umucunguzi
Yatanze ubugingo bwe bwose
Amfira k'Umusaraba
R/Yabambwe k'Umusaraba
Yabambwe k'Umusaraba
Yikoreye ibyaha, arambohora
Yabambwe K'Umusaraba.
2. Yasize ubwiza bwe mu luru
Kugira ngo aducungure
Hano ku isi yaciye bugufi
Atubohoza Amaraso.
3. Yarababajwe arinjye azira
Yajanjaguwe ku bwanjye
Yishyizeho indwara zanjye zose
Arapfa ngo njye nezerwe.
13

title: NYUZUZA URUKUNDO
lyrics:
8. NYUZUZA URUKUNDO
1. Reka Mwami ny ure mu inzira wanyuzemo,
Inzira inyobora mu Ijuru,
Utanga umunezero kubatereranwe,
Nyuzuza urukundo Mwami
R/ Nyuzuza urukundo Mwami,
uko ngendana n'inuma
reka ngende buri munsi,
n'indirimbo n'ibyishimo
Nyuzuza urukundo rwawe
2. Ngume iruhande rwawe, Yesu unyobora
We kundekera mu mwijima;
Undinde uburakari
Unvure ubugingo bwanjye,
Nyuzuza urukundo Mwami.
3.Aho bukera ni iherezo ry' urugendo,
Iherezo ry' urugendo
Nzatura mu ljuru
Ndirimbe, Mwami shimwa
Nyuzuza urukundo Mwami
14

title: UMWAMI ARANKUNDA
lyrics:
9. UMWAMI ARANKUNDA
1. Umwami arankunda, bihebuje
Umwami arankunda, Ni urukundo.
R/Nzabivuga iteka
Yesu arankunda
Yesu arankunda
Ni urukundo
2. Mu mibabaro, mu busharire
lyo ndira njyewe mbabaye, nzabivuga iteka
3. Iyo mbabaye, nta byiringiro
iyo mbabaye, bikomeye, nzabivuga iteka
4.Mu gahinda kenshi, ndemerewe
Naniwe cyane, nazimiye, nzabivuga iteka
5.Mu buntu bwe, yaranyitangiye
Ancunguza ayo Maraso ye, nzabivuga iteka
7.I kaluvari kure y'Ijuru, Yaretswe rwose
Araza amena Amaraso ye, nzabivuga iteka
8. Icyubahiro kibe icyawe,
Umwana w' Intama ahimbazwe, nzabivuga iteka
15

title: REKA NGUSHIME
lyrics:
10. REKA NGUSHIME
1. Umwami Yesu ni ubwugamo bwanive
Yampaye amahoro mu mutima
Ibimbabaza abinkuraho byose
Nemeye najye kujya muhimbaza
R/ Reka ngushime yewe Mwami waniye
Ibyo wakoze birakomeye
Kuba warankuye mu madini
Ukanshyira mu Itorero ryawe
2. Narakubonye yewe Mana yanive
Mu bihe bibi bikomeye
Narinzi ko ibyanjye birangiye
Ineza yawe Mana irantabara
3. Amagambo yawe Mana aranezeza
Agaragaza kamere yawe
Ibyo waremye nabyo hano ku isi
Bigaragaza gukomera kwawe
4. Uguhinyura ni inde Mana yaniye
Nahanga amaso k'Umusaraba
Wemeye gupfa ako kageni
Kugirango mwami ukize umuntu.
16

title: NZAMUREBA
lyrics:
11. NZAMUREBA
1. Yesu yaje hano muri iy' isi
Aje ku mugambi w 'Ijuru
Imana nzima yera yihindura umuntu
Kugirango twe ducungurwe.
R/ Nzamureba Yesu nzamureba
Nzamureba maze mu menye
Nzamureba Yesu nzamureba
Nzanezezwa n'agakiza ke
2. Imana yaje kubohora abantu bayo
Ariko bo ntibamumenya
Baramufata baramubamba baramwica
Mbabazwa n' urupfu yapfuye
3. Yesu azagaruka hano muri iv' isi
Aje gucungura Umugeni we
Uwo yakoye Amaraso ye y'igiciro
Bajye kwibanira mu Furu
4. Ningera mu Ijuru ho ku Mana yacu
Tuzabona abacu twabuze
Petero Branham ndetse na Yohana
Abo bose tuzababona
17

title: KU MUSOZI WA SANISETI
lyrics:
II.UMUHANUZI WIGIHE CY'IMPERUKA
12. KU MUSOZI WA SANISETI
R/ Ku musozi wa Sani Seti,
Ku mugoroba izuba rirenga
Niho habonetse inking nkiyabonekeye Sawuli
William Branham (×2)
Inkingi y'umuriro iramugota
1. Reba hejuru ku mutwe wiwe,
Urabona inking y'umuriro
Bene Data bakundwa vihishurive intamenyekana
Ibi byose yabihishe abanyabwenge (×2)
Ngo ubwami bw'Imana bwamamare
2. Igihe yatumirwaga mu nama
Abapasitori bize bateranye
Bari bazi yuko Branham
Akorwa n'isoni Izuba rirenga
Umwuka w'Imana amubonye
Amukomeza mubyo avuga
Ati wigira ubwora Branham (×2)
Izi saha turi kumwe
3. Umwuka Wera umaze kwigaragaza
Branham yahawe ubutumwa
Ati genda uburire abatuye iy isi
Bari mu bikorwa by'umwijima
18
Abemera kwihana mubabatize
Babatizwe mu'Izina ry'Umwami Yesu
4. None Mwene Data wumva ubu butumwa
Isaha zawe zaba ari izi zigeze
Ngo wegere Umwami Yesu akubabarire
Ibicumuro byawe byose wakoze
Ubu ni igihe cyo gutanga imbabazi
Ari ku bicu ubu ni wowe ategereje
19

title: IGIHE CYA NYUMA
lyrics:
13. IGIHE CYA NYUMA
1.Ndabona ibihe biruhije by'iy' isi,
Abantu bashaka ibyo uyu mubiri
Bashaka iby' iy'isi bibahumuriza
Ntibazi ko byose ari ubusa ni iherezo
R/ Niherezo, riregereje,
Umugeni ari kwihuriza hamwe,
Mu mahanga biranze
Isiraheri irageruwe,
Ni iherezo Umuhanuzi yavuzeho.
2. Mbese iki nicyo gihe Umuhanuzi yavuze,
Maravika yaje arangurura,
Jiwi rye ryanyeganyeje imisozi,
[iwi rikomeye ryeruye ati nta gihe.
3. Mbese witaye ku butumwa bw' igihe,
Mbese usoma Malaki kane,
Ibyahishuwe icumi,
Luka cumi na karindwi,
Ubu butumwa bu bivugaho ni iherezo.
20

title: UKO IBISEKURU
lyrics:
14. UKO IBISEKURU
R/ Uko ibisekuru byagiye bisimburana
Niko byagiye bigira Intumwa zabyo
Ni kuki n'iki gisekuruza cyacu
Nacyo kitaba kidafite Intumwa yacyo
1. Ku musozi Mwiza, witwa Sinayi
Niho Mose yaganiriye n'Imana
Maze Imuha amategeko yayo
Kuyashyikiriza Abisirayeli
2. Umwuka Wera yahanurive Amatorero
Ashyiraho n'Intumwa hamwe n'Abahanuzi
Ngo babwirize banaburire amatorero
Umwuka Wera nawe abafashe kwisuzuma
Abakoze ibyaha nabo babashe kubyihana
Umwuka Wera abinjize ijya mu ljuru
3. Ibyahishuwe Intumwa Yohana
Umutwe wa kabiri kugera kuwa gatatu
Hatwereka intondeke zigize amatorero
Aribyo bisekuru by abemera Yesu
Malaki gatatu nawe akatubwira ati
Dore nzaboherereza Umuhanuzi Eliya
4. Abefeso bigishijwe na Pawulo
Simuruna yigishijwe na Irene
21
Perugamu aribwo Bwami bwa satani
Irwanya amatorero yavugaga Yesu
Martini umwigisha wiki gisekuru,
Niwe wari ijwi ry'igisekuru cyaryo
5. Umwuka Wera arongera arigaragaza
Tuwatira yigishwa na Kolomba
Sarudi nayo yigishwa na Luteli
Akaba umupadiri ufite Umwuka Wera
Awukoresheje uhembura amatorero
Firaderifiya Wesileyi araza
Lawodokiya nayo ntiyapfukiranwa
Umwuka Wera yohereza Branham
22

title: BRANHAM AHAGAZE MU RUZI RWA OHIO
lyrics:
15. BRANHAM AHAGAZE MU RUZI RWA OHIO
R/ Branham ahagaze mu ruzi rwa Ohio
Ari kubatiza umuntu wa cumi na karindwi
Haza Ijwi rirangurura riri kumubwira riti
Natumye Yohana kunteguriza kuza kwa mbere
Nawe genda untegurize kugaruka kwa kabiri
1. Branham igihe amaze kumva iryo jwi
Inkingi y'Umuriro uwo mwanya Imwambika imbaraga
Imujyana mu bihugu byinshi
Kuhavuga ubutumwa ahanurira abantu benshi
Kandi asengera abarwayi
2. Mu mwaka w'igihumbi na magana cyenda mirongo
itanu
Hari mukwezi kwa mbere
Branham aratumirwa mugiterane gikomeye Cyabereye I hustoni
Mu bandi ba pasiteri b'amadini anyuranye Ari ku gicaniro babona
inkingi y'Umuriro,
Yageze ku mutwe wiwe bose baratungurwa
Bababazwa n'ibibaye K' umuntu bahoze bapinga
3. Ako kanya abapasiteri bize za Tewolojiya
Bitotombeye rimwe bose bati ibibaye n'ibiki
K'umuntu utagira ishuli ntagire n'amafaranga
Dusebeye imbere y'iwe
Reka twange ubutumwa bwe
4. Abanyamakuru nabo ubwabo
Birebera ibibaye bati ibi bintu ntibisanzwe
Kandi sibyo gucecekwa
Babikwiza ibinyamakuru byinshi binyuranye
23
Niba wagirango ndabeshya andika
Duburove eshatu (www). Branham.doticome
Niho ubonera Branham hamwe n'ubutumwa bwe
24

title: MENYA IGIHE CYAWE
lyrics:
16. MENYA IGIHE CYAWE
R/Menya igihe cyawe,
n'Ubutumwa bwacyo
Ibyavuzwe birasohoye,
nawe uhitemo
1. Ibuka Nowa, igihe yabaje inkuge
Abamubonaga abenshi baramuseka
Umwuzure uje abantu bararohama
2. No mugihe cyacu dufite Umuhanuzi ubu,
Eliya wavuzwe n'Umuhanuzi mukuru,
Malaki gatatu niho hatubwira hati,
Dore nzaboherereza Umuhanuzi Eliya
3. Torero ry'Imana
Murwane izo ntambara
Dore isezerano rigiye gusohora
Ngo Umukwe wavuzwe abone Umugeni we
Nta yindi nteguza wizere ubu butumwa
Humbe 'geni wa Kristo w'igitur cy'imperaka
4. Igihe cyo kuza, Kwa Yesu
Yoherereje Yohana kumuteguriza
Nigihe cyo kuza kw'Iwe kwa kabiri
Yoherereje Branham
25

title: IJWI RY'UMUHANUZI
lyrics:
17. IJWI RY'UMUHANUZI
R/Tega amatwi ijwi ry'Umuhanuzi
William Marrion Branham wowe
Gisekuru cy'i Lawodokiya aguhe
Umuti wo gusiga ku maso.
1. Lawodokiya wowe wiyita umukire
Ati ndi umutunzi kandi ndatunganiwe
Mubyahishuriwe intumwa Yohana yavuze
Yuko ari wowe mutindi ukaba umukene
Kandi ukaba n'impumyi ndetse na nubu
Wambaye ubusa.
2. Ibyahishuriwe Intumwa Yohana ibice bitatu
Cumi n'umunani hakugira inama yo kumuguraho
izahabu imwe yatunganirijwe mu ruganda
3. Yewe muntu w'i Lawodokiya gura izahabu nibwo
Witwa umutunzi n' imyenda yera wambike ubwambure
Bwawe kuko abo Nkunda bose ndabacyaha.
26

title: BRANHAM UYU YABAYEHO
lyrics:
18. BRANHAM UYU YABAYEHO
R/Branham uyu yabayeho
Ku itariki esheshatu z'ukwezi kwa Kane
Igihumbi magana cyenda n'icyenda
Avukira I Kentuki muri Amerika
1. Igitangaza cya mbere
Cyabaye avuka
Mu rugo iwabo
Habaye umucyo udasanzwe
Inkingi y'umuriro itangira ku mwihishurira
Ko izamumurikira mu mibereho yiwe
2. Mu kwezi kwa cyenda,
Ho muri uy'umwaka
Igihumbi magana cyenda na cumi na gatandatu
Niho yavuye ku iriba avuye kuvoma
Ahita ahura na Marayika w'Imana
4.Marayika umva inshingano
Ubwe yamuhaye ati Branham
Ntuzanywe inzoga n'itabi
Kandi uzirinde ikibi icyo aricyo cyose
Kuko nukura nzakugira igikoresho
5. Marayika w'Imana akimuvugisha
Branham yahise yuzura ubwoba
27
Arirukanka agenda aririra hose
Mama wiwe ahita amubaza icyo abaye
6. Branham yamusubizanije ubwoba
N'amarira menshi ndetse n'agahinda
Ati naringeze mu nzira mva kuvoma
Haza umuyaga numva umuntu arampamagaye
Nawe wumve ukuntu yahise ambwira
Ati Branham ntuzanywe inzoga n'itabi
Kandi uzirinde ikibi icyo aricyo cyose
Kuko nukura nzakugira igikoresho
7. Mwene Data nawe tega amatwi yawe
Umuhamagaro wawe nugera wumve
Ufite ijambo nawe wavuzweho uvuka
Hora uri maso nuhamagarwa witabe
28

title: NIKI UTUMVA
lyrics:
19. NIKI UTUMVA
1. Nk'uko yatumye Yohana
Mu kuza kwe kwa mbere
Na Branham niko byamugendekeye
Guteguriza Yesu kuza kwa Kabiri
R/Niki Niki utumva Mwene Data
Wumva ubu Butumwa
Nta kindi gihe gisigaye
Ngo uzabona undi ukuburira
2. Mu gihe cy' umugoroba,
Branham ntiyaryamye
Yabonye inkingi y'Umuriro,
Imanuka imwegera
Ngo ahishurirwe iby'ubwiru,
Ubutumwa bwiza bugere ku isi yose
3. Iri tabaza wabonye, ry'ibitereko birindwi
Ni ryo amatorero arindwi,
Umwuka Wera wabwiye
Yuko uzakuramo
Umugeni, nawe tangira umese ikanzu
4. Mu butumwa bw'umugoroba,
Nicyo cya gihe cy'ubuhanga
Nicyo gihe cy'ubushishozi,
Nk'uko Yohana abitubwira
Abafite amatwi nibumve,
29
Kuko nta yindi nteguza hanyuma
5. Mu isenywa ry'i Babuloni, bohererejwe
Umuhanuzi binangira imitima, bicwa n'ubwibone bwabo
Uburaya n'ubusinzi, nibyo byatumye barimbuka
6. Mu butumwa bwa Branham
Yahawe no gukiza indwara
Ibihumbi mirongo itatu na bitanu,
Birakira Anasengera abapfuye
7.Bamwe muribo barazuka
Harimo umwana w'umuhungu,
Wo mugihugu cya Finilande
Yanakijije kanseri umukobwa wari waranyunyutse
30

title: IBYAHANUWE N'ABAHANUZI
lyrics:
20. IBYAHANUWE N'ABAHANUZI
1. Ibyahanuwe n'Abahanuzi
Mwibuke ko byose, bisohoye
Mureke gukerensa rino Jambo
Mudahinduka nka muka Loti
2. Ubu Butumwa n'ubwanyu bakundwa
Mwabuteguriwe n'Umwuka Wera,
Mwibuke ljambo yatumye Malaki
Ati nzaboherereza Umuhanuzi
3. Ku musozi mwiza Saniseti
Niho havuye ubu butumwa bwiza
Bwahanuwe n'Abahanuzi kera
None busohoye mu gihe cyacu
4. Bene Data mwirinde igihe cyose
Mukore ibyiza kandi igihe cyose
Umwami Yesu azaza nk'umujura
Ariyo mpamvu ubu yaduteguye
31

title: NIKI GITUMA USHIDIKANYA
lyrics:
21. NIKI GITUMA USHIDIKANYA
R/Ni iki gituma ushidikanya ibitangaza by'Imana
Biracyakorwa Jeferson ville wo muri indiyana
Inkingi y'umuriro iramanuka ati Branham ko na tumye
Yohana kunteguriza kuza kwanje kwa mbere nawe
niko ngutumye kunteguriza ukugaruka kwanjye kw kabiri,
1. Umwaka wigihumbi Magana cyenda maku
Myabiri na karindwi Branham afite imyaka
Cumi n'umunani marayika w'Imana aramu
Bonekera amuteguza gutangira umurimo w'Imana.
2. Branham yahawe buno butumwa abwakirana
Ituza adashidikanya abukwiza isi yose ngo aba
Bwemera bihane babatizwe mu Izina rya Yesu
Bababarirwe ibyaha byabo bakoze ukuzamurwa
kwacu kuri bugufi.
3. Kera mwibuke ko tutari ubwoko namba
None ubu turabarwa mu bwoko bw'Imana
Kera ntitwari twakababarirwa none
Twacunguwe n'Amaraso ya Yesu.
4. Inkingi y'Umuriro ku musozi sani seti
Marayika w'Imana yaramanutse ngo
Ibyari ubwiru byose bisobanuke agakiza
Gasubire muri Isirayeli.
32

title: IBYIZA BYO MURI UBU BUTUMWA
lyrics:
22. IBYIZA BYO MURI UBU BUTUMWA
1. ibiza byo muri ubu butumwa byamaze kuducengera
Tubizaniwe na Yesu 'Umuhanuzi William Marion Branham
Twari turuhiye mu madini adukuzayo ineza ye
None ubu twahindutse umwe niyo mpamvu tumwirata
R/Ni wowe dushyize imbere Mwami w'amahanga yose
Naho twaba mu bukene tuzagumya kukwirata
2. Sinzigera nibagirwa uko wabanye
N'Umuhanuzi William Marrion Branham
Inkingi y'Umuriro iramugota
Nibuka nimibanire ya Yosuwa na Kalebu
na Elisa na Eliya na Pawulo na Timoteyo
Umurimo wawe Mana nukore
Abawukurikije Badasigana
mu rugendo ukabarangaza imbere
3. Intwari zatubanjirije zomatanye nawe iteka
Wazirutiye imirima ndetse n'amashyo mu biraro
Niyo mpamvu zakwirase ndetse na bugingo
N'ubu zirase imbaraga zawe Mana nanjye ndagushimive
Naho imirima yarumba n'amashyo akanshiraho
Ntacyambuza kukwirata kuko wambereye byose
33

title: UKO ABISIRAYELI BASOHOTSE
lyrics:
III GUSOHOKA
23. UKO ABISIRAYELI BASOHOTSE
1. Uko Abisirayeli basohotse,
Bava mu Egiputa kwa Faraso
Niko natwe turi gusohoka
Tuva mu madini yose
R/ Niba utagize umwete wo gusahaka
Ntabwo uzagera muri Yerusalemu siya
Yateguriwe Umugeni wa Yesu
Ubwo azaza kutujyana
2. Twamaze kubona Umuhanuzi
Niwe watuzaniye ubutumwa
Butuyobora muri uru rugendo
Dufite rujya mu juru.
3. lcyo gihugu, kirakomeye
Namuntu uzapfa kwinjira gusa
Keretse uwizeye unu rumuri
Rw'igihe cy'umugoroba
34

title: MUSOHOKE BABULONI
lyrics:
24. MUSOHOKE BABULONI
R/Bene Data musohoke
Babuloni Mureke ubusinzi mureke ubusambanyi
Hamwe n'izindi ngeso
Uwiteka yanga urunuka
Ibi nibyo byaha byarimbuye Babuloni
1. Bene Data, musohoke Babuloni
Muve mu madini, Yabagize imbata zayo
Yo atigeze amenya yuko Yesu ari Imana
Kugeza na nubu amadini ari kumurwanya
2. Bene Data, musohoke Babuloni
Muve mu madini yabagize imbata zayo
Mwibuke ko Kayafa Yari umutambyi mukuru niwe watumye
Yesu Bamujyana kwa Pilato
3. Bene Data, musohoke Babuloni
Muve mu madini, Yabagize imbata zayo
Yigisha Tewolojiya, Agahisha jambo ry'Imana.
Ijambo ry'ukuri rigahinduka iyobera
4. Bene Data, musohoke Babuloni,
Yesu niwe nzira, Niwe kuri, n'ubugingo
Yabihamirije Yohana cumi na kane
Reba ku murongo wa gatandatu uhasome
35

title: KU MABABA Y'IKIZU
lyrics:
25. KU MABABA Y'IKIZU
1. Nahoze mbundikiwe munsi y'amababa y'inkoko
Nyuma namenye ko ntari mu muryango wizo nkoko
ljwi ryampamagaye ntiryari ijwi ry'inkoko
Ryari ijwi ry'Ikizu rya Data Eli-shadai
R/Guruka ugere kure yewe mwana w'Ikizu(2)
Reka ibyo byaha n'imiruho iyo ni kamere y'inkoko
Kandi bene abo ntibazaraganwa Ijuru n'Ibiza
2. liwi ryampamagaye ryantandukanije n'inkoko
Ariyo Madini yo muri iy' isi icuze umwijima
Amadini y'iki gihe arimo kubamba ljambo
Kuko kamere yayo ari kamere y'inkoko
3.lyo Ikizu gishaje cyegera urutare
Gikubita amababa yacyo kuri urwo rutare
Kikicara gitegereje uwakigaburira
Ibibazo byawe nawe ubihe Kristo
4. Niba uri umwana w'Ikizu gira kamere nk'iyacyo
lbigeragezo byawe ubishyire kuri Kristo
Nk'uko Ikizu cyarika icyari ku rutare
Niko n'Umukristo yubaka ku Guhishurirwa
5. Nari igi ryaburiye mu cyari cy'izo nkoko
Nyuma nkurira muri zo ariko njye ntari inkoko
Numva iwi ryumvikana rimbwira ngo nguruke
Mve mu mibereho yazo menye ko njyive ndi Ikizu
36

title: KUTAMENYA IYO UVA
lyrics:
26. KUTAMENYA IYO UVA
R/Kutamenya iyo uva n'intambara ikomeye
Ntunamenye iyo ujya nawe ubitekereze
Ubone gushidikanya kuri ubu butumwa
Ntabwo Imana Yacu yaba ari Umubeshyi
1. Yewe Mwene Data
Wumva buno butumwa
Soma muri Malaki ibice byaho bitatu
Umurongo wa makumyabiri na gatatu
Ugeze kuwa makumyabiri na Kane
2.Umva isezerano Eliya yateguriwe
Niwe uzasanganya imitima y'abana na ba Se
Niwe uzagarura ukwizera kw'iz' intumwa
Zose uko zingana ukuyemo uwitwa Yuda
3.Mu mirimo y'Intumwa
Habagamo ukwizera
Habagamo urukundo n'ubudahemuka
Zogezaga Yesu no ku bandi batamuzi
Ngo ubutumwa bw'Ubwami bubone Kubanza kuza
4.Yohana umubatiza Nawe yaje ari integuza
Yabwiye rubanda yuko hari ugiye kuza
Yuko atapfundura udushumi tw'inkweto ziwe
Haboneka umucyo Umwami Yesu araza
Indirabo Umugeni wyka -
37
5. Tega amatwi Torero ry'i Lawodokiya
Wumve isezerano nawe wateguriwe
Ni wowe wabwiwe muri iki gisekuru,
Yuko Eliya ariwe ugomba kubanza kuza
6. Ku musozi Sani Seti
Havuye igitangaza Inkingi y'umuriro ihita igota Branham
Ngo isezerano ryacu ribone gusohora
Ahubwo hahirwa uwizera ubutumwa
38

title: INKUGE Y'IGIHE CY'UMUGOROBA
lyrics:
27. INKUGE Y'IGIHE CY'UMUGOROBA
1. Inkuge y'ik'igihe cy'umugoroba
Nta handi wayibona uretse mu
ljambo ljambo ry'Imana Bibiliya Yera
Itubere umuyobozi
R/Ufite inzira ebyiri imbere yawe
Imwe y'Ubugigo indi ni urupfu Ihitiremo neza ube
Umugeni wa Yesu muzishimane
2. Sohoka muri baburoni wiyizire mu ljambo
Ijambo ry'Imana ry'ikigihe cyacu
Umugeni wa nyuma namara kwinjira
Twe tuzishimana na Yesu
3. Cvo dushime Imana yo itaturetse
Ngo tuzire ibyaha byaturembeje
Ikigira Umwana Ikaducungura
Idukunda cyane nishimwe
39

title: BAVA HIRYA NO HINO
lyrics:
28. BAVA HIRYA NO HINO
1. Bava hirya no hino,
Mu mahanga ya kure,
Kwishimana n'Umwami
Abatumirwa be,
Mbega abanyamugisha,
Batumbira ubwiza bwe,
Burabagirana, bagiriwe ubuntu bwe,
Nk'Amasaro y'ikamba rye.
R/ Nishimye kuva igihe
Yesu uwo yambohoye,
Si nkikoreye ayo maganya yamberaga umutwaro,
Nabaga mu mwijima ariko wahunze,
None ubu mfite insinzi kuko Yesu yambohoye
2. Nabonye intebe ye yera
Bayihagaze imbere,
Nta kurira ukundi, nta n'agahinda,
Nta rupfu mu murwa mwiza,
Umwami yambanjirije,
Antegurira inzira,
Vuba tuzamubona mu ijuru iteka ryose.
3. Amarembo y'uwo murwa,
Yuguruye amanywa, ijoro
Reba Umukiza utugirira ubuntu,
40
Aduha ibyicaro byiza,
Ibyicaro muri uwo murwa
Byaduteguriwe, twitegure ibirori, umva guhamagarwa
4. Yesu agiye kugaruka,
Imibabaro yose ishire,
Niba Umwami wacu aje aka kanya
Kubwo abatagira icyaha,
Mbese wagira ibyishimo cyangwa se agahinda
Ubwo azaza mu bwiza bwe tuzahurira mu ibicu
41

title: NIMUHUNGE UMUJINYA
lyrics:
29. NIMUHUNGE UMUJINYA
1. Igihe umwuzure utsemba abatuye i
Y'isi umugabo Nowa yarabihishuriwe
Yatumwe n'Imana kwibariza inkuge
Abwiye ab'iy'isi banga kumwumvira
R/ Nimuhunge muhunge umujinya ugiye
Gutsemba abanze kwihana, Nowa
Yabwirije kwibariza inkunge abibwiye ab'iy'isi
Banga ku mwunvira.
2. Igihe i Sodomu bajya kurimbuka hajya aba
Marayika ntibabihishurirwa, bageze kwa
Loti Umugaragu w'Imana abishwe n'irari bashaka kubangiza
3. Dore ubu imperuka igeze bugufi mwese
Muhungire mu ljambo ry'igihe kuko yabi
Bwiye Umuhanuzi Malaki ati nzaboherereza
Umuhanuzi Eliya maze Eliya aje banga
Kumwumvira bihakana Intumwa n'ljambo yatumwe.
4. Yemwe gisekuru cy'i Lawodikiya mufite Ubutumwa
Mukanga kubwemera Inkingi y'Umuriro yaragaragaye
Yarije guhamya Umuhanuzi yatumye ni
Muri Malaki gatatu havuga mwese mu mwumvire
Kandi mu mwemere.
42

title: UBUHUNGIRO NI YESU
lyrics:
30. UBUHUNGIRO NI YESU
R/Ubuhungiro ni Yesu
Umufasha utabura mu byago
Uri mwiza Yesu uri mwiza
Ntawe nakugereranya
1. Mu bihe bibi uransanga
Uti: mwana wanjye humura
Ndikumwe nawe wigira ubwoba
Nzakurinda, reka kwiheba
2. Daniyeli nawe yaramusanze
Ati: mwana wanjye humura
Ndikumwe nawe wigira ubwoba
Ndakurinda ziriya ntare
3. Na Mose ageze ku inyanja itukura
Ati: mwana wanjye humura
Rambura inkoni yaniye naguhaye
Hejuru y'amazi urabona inzira
43

title: UYU NIWE BAVUZE
lyrics:
31. UYU NIWE BAVUZE
R/Uyu niwe bavuze uzaza uri mu bicu
Nk'uko Luka abitubwira makumyabiri
Na rimwe umurongo wa makumyabiri
Na karindwi aya niyo magambo yasize yivugiye
1. Mwubure amaso murebe nguyu ari mu
Bicu Kumusozi sun set niho yagaragaye
Nguriya ari ku muryango nimumukingurire.
2. Igitangaza kiravuga igihe cya nimugoroba
Umusozi sun set umanukaho igihu cyenda
Gukabakaba hasi abantu barahurura.
3. Bazana abanyamakuru bibinyamakuru
Bitatu bibonera ibitangaza bibaye muri
Amerika inkurunziza ikwira hose igera
No kumpera zisi
4. Tega amatwi wiyumvire bino binyamakuru
lcya mbere cyitwa Look bisobanura kureba
Icya kabiri ni Time bisobanura igihe icya
Gatatu ni Life bisobanura ubuzima ruba ufite
Enterineti reba kuri google yawe duble Vincuro
Eshatu akadomo branham akadomo doti kome
Niho usanga buno butumwa. bwigihe cyacu tuje tumwiringira
niwe wadukubitiwe rimwe rizira kabiri arapla arazuka
None ubu ni muzima.
44

title: NIYO UMURABA
lyrics:
32. NIYO UMURABA
1. Isirayeli iva muri Egiputa
Imbere yabo hari inyanja bambutse ubutayu
Na yorodani, ubwo bafunguye amarembo y'umwanz
R/Niyo umuraba wahuha cyane
Ndetse n'isi nayo igatigita
lcyo nshaka n'ijuru nasezeranijwe
Ntacyambuza gukomeza.
2. Yobu yahuye n'ibigeragezo inshuti ze zose zimucikabo
We yarizeye Iramukiza, ubwo aba afunguye amarembo
Y'umwanzi.
3. Saduraka Meshake na Abedenego batawe mu itanura
Ry'umuriro iyo bizeye irabakiza,
Ubwo bafunguye amarembo y'umwanzi
4. Daniyeli yatawe mu rwobo rw'intare
Azira gusenga Imana nzima, iyo yizeye izifunga imi
Ubwo abafunguye amarembo y'umwanzi
5.Naho waterwa nibigeragezo
Wicika intege komeza urugendo, ntuhagarare
Ntuhungabane ufungure ayo marembo y'umwanzi
45

title: YEMWE MWA BANYAMADINI MWE
lyrics:
33. YEMWE MWA BANYAMADINI MWE
R/Yemwe mwa banyamadini mwe
Mwebwe abize za tewoloji ninde
Wabonye inkingi y'umuriro
Imwihishurira ngo imuhe ubutumwa
1. Sawuli mu inzira ijya i Damasiko
Agiye kurwanya ubwoko bw'Imana
Inkingi y'umuriro ihita imanuka iti
Sawuli urandenganyiriza iki?
Nawe ati urinde Mwami nka gukorera
Nawe ati ni Yesu uhora utoteza.
2. jambo ry Imana ntiryigwa mu mashuri
Uzabaze Nimurodi n'abambari be igihe
Bubaka umunara w'i Babeli
Imana bose ibahananturira rimwe
3. Ijambo ry Imana kuki muryibagirwa niba
Mwemera iyi ntumwa Pawulo ko yabatinije
Mu Izina rya Yesu mwebwe mukabatiriza mu butatu
4. Umwanditsi w'ivanjiri witwa Matayo
Abisobanura neza kuri ibi bice soma
Ku gice cya cumi na gatanu umurongo
Waho nuwa gatandatu ngo Ijambo
Ry'Imana mwarihinduye ubusa ngo
Mwikomereza imigenzo yanyu gusa
46

title: ISI ISHAJE NTIYANZIRIKA
lyrics:
Ngo ariko utazigisha wese nk'iz Intumwa
Nawe navumwe niko ljambo ryayo riri.
34. ISI ISHAJE NTIYANZIRIKA
ly'isi ishaje ntiyanzirika
Nzigendera, igihe cyose
Kuko na mwiyeguriye
Nkaba nambaye Umwenda w'Ubukwe
1. Kutizera ntikwanzirika nzigendera, igihe cyose
Kuko namwiyegurive
Nkaba nambaye Umwenda w'Ubukwe
2. Imibabaro ntiyanzirika nzigendera, igihe cyose
Kuko namwiyeguriye
Nkaba nambaye Umwenda w'Ubukwe
3. Uburwayi ntibwanzirika nzigendera,
igihe cyose Kuko namwiyeguriye
Nkaba nambaye Umwenda w'Ubukwe
47

title: GIRA VUBA WINJIRE
lyrics:
35. GIRA VUBA WINJIRE
1. Tukiri mu madini ntitwari tuzi ukuri
Ariko Umwami Imana iradutabara
Yohereza Umuhanuzi Branham
Mana warakoze
R/ Gira vuba winjire mu rugo rw'Imana
Hanze hazaba imbwa n'abarozi
2. Muri ibi bihe bya nyuma turimo
(Abakristo) bariyoberanya
Bagakora ibyo bishakiye ariko Yesu agiye
kugaruka gutwara Umugeni
3. Yewe Mugeni warasohotse
Ariko Mugeni icyo wamenye kibwire abandi
Kugira ngo dusangire ijuru.
48

title: MWENE DATA
lyrics:
36. MWENE DATA
R/Mwene Data wumva ubu butumwa wizuyaza
Kandi wishidikanya dore isezerano riri bugufi
Utazatungurwa haraje integuza.
Uko byari bimeze kwa Nowa n'uy'umunsi
Niko bikimeze uko byari bimeze kwa Loti
N'uyu munsi niko bikimeze.
1. Imyaka ijana na makumyabiri Nowa yamaze
Yubaka inkuge abwira abantu ko umwuzure
Uje kuba, abenshi biterera agati mu ryinyo.
2. Yabaje inkuge abwiriza n'Ubutumwa ab'icyo
Gihe bose bari kumuseka ljambo ry 'Imana
riza gusohora inkuge yuzuye Nowa arinjira
Imana Imwereka ibyo azarokora umwuzure uje
Ibindi byose urabitsemba.
3. Branham muri iki gisekuru niwe wabashije
Guhura n'Imana Imuhishurira ibyari ubwiru
Byose bimwe Yohana yabujijwe kwandika.
4. Ikingi y'Umuriro agihura nayo imuha ubutumwa
Ashyira amahanga yose asengera abarwayi
Benshi barakira ndetse n'abapfuye bamwe
Barazuka.
49

title: UBUTUMWA BWIZA
lyrics:
37. UBUTUMWA BWIZA
R/Ubutumwa bwiza buratangwa ku mabande
n'ama Brochile ngo bizaba ibihamya kubyo
Twasezeranijwe Kuko isezerano ryacu ryasohoye
1. Imana koko Isohoza isezerano Yo yatubwiye it
Nzabaha Umuhanuzi Eliya umunsi ukomeye kandi
Uteye ubwoba icyo gihe uzaba utaragera
2. Yesu ati ninjye nzira ukuri n'ubugingo ntawe ujya
Kwa Data ntamujyanyeyo ntimuhagarike imitima
Yanyu mwizere Imana nanjye munyizere.
3. Nowa igihe yabazaga inkuge yari yeretswe ko
Umwuzure ugiye kuba abwira abantu
Inkuge baramuseka umwuzure uje urabatwara. ngo bibarize
4. Niba wemera ko Imana itajya ibeshya soma Matayo
Makumyabiri na kane umurongo nuwa cumi na kane
Hatege amatwi wumve ukuntu havuga nibwo ubutumwa
Bwiza bw' ubwami buzigishwa mu isi yose ngo buhe ubu
Hamya bwo guhamiriza amahanga yose
Nibwo imperuka izahera ko ize
50

title: MU MAHANGA BIRANZE
lyrics:
IV. KWIHANA
38. MU MAHANGA BIRANZE
1. Mu mahanga biranze
Isirayeli iragaruwe
Ibimenyetso byahanuwe
Iminsi irashize
Yuzuye amaganya
Vuba n'ibihe bidashira
R/ Umunsi wo gucungurwa uri hafi
Imitima ifite ubwoba
Ngwino wuzure Umwuka, tegura itara
Ugucungurwa kuregereje
2. Amajuru aranyeganyega
Abenshi ntibazi, ibirimo biraberamo
Komera Torero, nyeganyega ganza
Ugucungurwa kuregereje
3. Umutini urarabije
Yerusalemu iragaruwe
Iryo shyanga ryari ryaranyazwe
Irahamagara
Imvura ya nyuma iragwa
Nyaruka wowe ugisigaye
4. Abanyabinyoma bahora babeshya
Bati Yesu Kristo siwe Mana
Bahakana ukuri ntibahishurirwa
Twebwe dukurikiye Intumwa
51

title: BANGUKA WIHANE
lyrics:
39. BANGUKA WIHANE
R/ Banguka banguka wihane
Ni wowe mugeni wari utegerejwe
Ikanzu yawe yasohotse mu ruganda
Impeta yawe icurwa n'umunyabuhanga
Mukundwa banguka Umukwe araje
1. Banguka dore Umukwe araje
Araje, araje kandi ntagisibya
Dore impanda ya Marayika wa karindwi
Irimo iravuga ko nta kindi gihe gisigaye
2. Banguka akubabarire ibyaha
Umese ikanzu mu Maraso ya Yesu
Kugira ngo naza asange nta kizinga
Wihane ubu jya muri Yorodani ubatizwe
3. Pawulo yabajije abizera ati
Mwabatijwe Mubatizo ki
Abandi nabo bamusubiza bati
Ni uwa Yohana, barongera barabatizwa
4.Babatijwe mu Izina ry'Umwami Yesu
Tubisanga mu byakozwe n'intumwa
Umutwe n'uwa cumi n'icyenda,
Umurongo wa gatanu
5. Yesu niwe nshuti itajya ihemuka
52

title: UBUNTU BWA YESU
lyrics:
Niwe Gitare Cyemeye Kudukubitirwa
Yemera gupfa ndetse arazuka ngo dukire,
Umwizera wese abone ubugingo
40. UBUNTU BWA YESU
1. Yewe ubuntu bwa Yesu,
Ntibugira akagero
Kuko nahoze mu byaha,
Mu mwijima nd'impumyi
Nuko mpura na Yesu,
Agenda ashaka intama ze
Ati ngwino ngukize,
Mubo nshaka urimo
R/Ndagusaba imbaraga
Mwami Mana y'urukundo
Wangize umwana wawe
Data mfata ukuboko
Dore uri hafi kugaruka
Kujyana Umugeni wawe
2. Angejeje mu buntu bwe,
Yanyuhagije Amaraso
Ankuraho imyanda yose,
Nambikwa imyambaro yera
Ubushwambagara bwose,
Abujugunya ahatibukwa
Amara inyota n'inzara, Anyitaho n'uy' umunsi
53
R/Ndagusaba imbaraga
Mwami Mana y'urukundo
Wangize umwana wawe
Data mfata ukuboko
Dore uri hafi kugaruka
Kujyan'Umugeni wawe
3. Isi n'ibibi byayo byose,
Sinari buzabisige
Nuko nabonye Umukiza,
Anshoboza kubizinukwa
None rero wa isi we,
Nawe mubiri nambaye
Nubwo mumpagurukiye,
Mfite Yesu uzabankiza
R/Mfite amasezerano
Na nyirayo ni muzima
Ntacyamuhagarika
Cyatuma atayasohoza
Mpishwe mu mababaye
Nk'ikizu n'umwana wacyo
4 Amadini nahozemo,
Yaje kuyansohoramo
Ambwira ko atariho aba,
Bamuta inyuma y'urugo Ati dore ibyo bavuga,
Bihabanye n'ibyo bakora
54
Babyitwaza kubwo indamu,
Nawe warabaretse
R/Yampishuriye ubutumwa,
Bw'igihe cy'umugoroba
Anyereka iki gihe cyanyuma,
N'Umuhanuzi yagitumyeho
Ngomba gusa n'Ubutumwa,
Nibwo nzagera mu ijuru
Kubumenya ntacyo bimaze,
Utagenda uko buvuga
5.Nkweretse bene data,
Abo waguze Amaraso
Abo waduhurije
Muri iki gisekuruza
Turindire muri wowe,
Urukundo rudutegeke
Maze uturwanirire,
Nta numwe wakwishoboza
R. Jya mu batakumenye,
Nabo ubihishurire
Komeza umugeni wawe,
Dukomeze isezerano
Maze tugutegereze,
Turi Itorero rishyitse
55

title: GARUKA MWAMI
lyrics:
41. GARUKA MWAMI
1.Habwa ikuzo Mucunguzi,
Ngwino turagutegereje,
Wowe wadukunze kera
Ngwino turagutegereje
R/Ngwino Mwami kubana bawe,
Tugutegerezanye imitima imenetse,
isi igeze ku iherezo
Ngwino turagutegereje
2. Wowe wasize ingoma yawe,
Ngwing turagutegereje,
Wigize umuntu udukize,
Ngwino turagutegeroje
3. Waducunguje Amaraso,
Ngwino turegutegereje,

title: YELUSALEMU NSHYA
lyrics:
93. YELUSALEMU NSHYA
R/Yewe Yelusaremu nshya yewe

Rirasohoye tugiye kugutambagira.
1. Yewe Yelusaremu nshya rwa rurembo

Umugeni ararimbishijwe

abajura abasinzi n'abasambanyi

title: HAKURYA Y'URUSIKA
lyrics:
94. HAKURYA Y'URUSIKA

title: AMAKURU YO MU IJURU
lyrics:
95. AMAKURU YO MU IJURU

satani nzamwishima hejuru

Ashaka ku kubohora
